visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with an outdoor shot of a Costco warehouse building at night during a rainstorm. Bright white building lights illuminate the wet asphalt ground where raindrops are visible on the surface. A massive, colorful graphic overlay dominates the screen featuring the Costco logo, a cartoon character looking surprised, and large neon-style text in Traditional Chinese announcing a weekly special report for October 20th to 26th. (2) The scene transitions into a rapid-fire montage of consumer products inside the warehouse store. Each shot centers on a specific item like toilet paper, pork belly, or laundry detergent stacked neatly on high-density shelving. High-contrast indoor lighting highlights the packaging textures and colors. Large, bold yellow and pink text overlays appear in the middle of every frame, detailing the product name, original price, discount amount, and final sale price in a high-impact variety-show style. (3) The montage continues at a breakneck speed, showcasing a wide array of snacks, beverages, frozen foods, and household goods. The camera remains static for each brief cut, focusing intently on the product boxes or containers. The background consistently features warehouse club aisles with industrial shelving and industrial fluorescent lighting. The graphic price tags remain the central visual focus, providing clear, high-density promotional information for the viewer until the final frame.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: No humans are clearly identifiable; the focus is entirely on product displays.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts with an exterior rainy night view of a Costco warehouse. It then transitions to various interior shots of the store's sales floor, specifically warehouse-style shelves, refrigerators, and display pallets filled with bulk products.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic pop music with a prominent, fast-paced beat begins immediately. A male narrator delivers an enthusiastic opening greeting in Traditional Chinese, characterized by a high-pitched, energetic tone and sharp articulation. A digital whoosh sound effect punctuates the transition from the outdoor setting to the first indoor product shot. (2) The male narrator begins a rapid-fire sequence of product descriptions, reading names and prices in strict synchronization with each jump cut. A short, bright digital 'ding' or 'pop' sound effect triggers at every single visual transition. The background music maintains a constant high-tempo major mode, sitting well below the dominant and projected vocal track. (3) The vocal delivery continues with high arousal and a professional yet excited tone, maintaining a consistent speech rate of nearly 4 words per second. There is zero ambient background noise, indicating a high-quality studio mix. The interplay of the driving electronic beat, the rhythmic narrator cadence, and the repetitive transition SFX creates a sense of high informational density and promotional urgency until the video ends.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To quickly inform Costco members in Taiwan about the specific discounted products and price reductions available for the week of October 20th to October 26th, utilizing high-energy editing to stimulate interest and urgent shopping behavior.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct listing of products with original and special prices under a Costco branding umbrella.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a social-media-native editing style characterized by extremely high text density and rapid-fire audio-visual synchronization to maximize information delivery within a short duration.
